# Awesome-WS-Security

> **Third-Party Notice:** Awesome-WS-Security is an external open-source project. It is not part of the original work in this repository. All content and links remain attributed to the original authors at https://github.com/Intelligent-Perception-Lab/Awesome-WS-Security.

---

## Source

- **Original Repository:** https://github.com/Intelligent-Perception-Lab/Awesome-WS-Security
- **Original Authors:** Intelligent Perception Lab and contributors
- **License:** To be verified before any content or code use

---

## Category

WiFi sensing security literature — curated list of papers, tools, and resources on wireless sensing security, attacks, privacy, and defenses.

---

## Why This Project Is Included

Awesome-WS-Security is included in this repository as a **third-party open-source external reference** for the following research purposes:

1. Literature mapping for WiFi sensing security research
2. Identifying relevant papers on adversarial attacks, CSI spoofing, and privacy leakage in WiFi sensing
3. Tracking the state of the art in wireless sensing defense and robustness
4. Supporting literature review for the physical-layer security and adversarial robustness sections of this research
5. Planning future robustness evaluation by identifying relevant attack and defense benchmarks

This project is **not** presented as original work and is **not** independently validated within this repository.

---

## Relationship to This Repository

This repository (`wifi-csi-fall-detection`) is a WiFi CSI fall-detection research prototype that uses **synthetic CSI-like data only**. Awesome-WS-Security is a curated literature and resource list, not a code framework.

| This Repository | Awesome-WS-Security (Third-Party) |
|---|---|
| `src/` — original pipeline code | `third_party/wifi_sensing_security/awesome_ws_security/` — documentation only |
| WiFi CSI fall-detection prototype | Curated security literature resource |
| Offline research prototype | Ongoing community-maintained list |
| My original research work | Third-party literature reference |

---

## Current Use

- **Documentation and reference review only** at this time
- No content from Awesome-WS-Security has been copied, adapted, or incorporated into the original `src/`, `notebooks/`, or `app.py` code in this repository
- Any future content or code reuse requires **license review and proper attribution**
- No Git submodule has been added; this folder serves as a placeholder and reference note only

---

## Validation Status

> **Important:** Awesome-WS-Security is a curated community resource. Papers and tools listed there are **not independently validated** by this repository. Inclusion of this reference does **not** imply that the papers, attacks, or defenses listed have been tested against or validated for this repository's pipeline.
